context: Planned deploy of capability-y v2 to general availability.
decision: Deploy capability-y v2 to general availability with standard monitoring.

context: Patched redeploy of capability-y. The accompanying incident, rollback, and post-incident review were handled in the incident tracker and not captured as DRP records. This record is the only link back to the 2026-04-01 deploy, and even that link is missing.
decision: Redeploy capability-y v2.1 (patched) to general availability.
